reviews.review_description: Not worth the $$$..want my money back…

I have played this basketball game. I want to see more balls and competitors as well as multiplayer mode and need mroe play grounds and players to play with more. More realistic physics and throw should be improved and want some power ups while playing this game. I want to play this game with my friends how can I play this game with them. I also want to record favorite match and throws in the game. Please new challenges, grounds, weathers, times and balls.

developer_response.body: Dear User, Thank you for your feedback. We'll incorporate your suggestions in coming updates. If you have any other suggestions please let us know at info@tulipapps.com.

reviews.review_description: I have this basketball game. Game experience is good specially the outdoor environment. Games graphics are good but throw is not that smooth. Please add more balla and environments.

developer_response.body:
Dear Player,
Thank you for the fantastic feedback on our VR basketball game! We're glad you enjoyed the overall experience and outdoor environment. Your input on the throw mechanics and the desire for more balls and environments is noted. We'll work on enhancing these aspects for an even better gaming experience. Shoot some hoops and stay tuned for updates!
